title: [codereview] rules.rs FieldDescriptor arrays remain empty (lines 59-96); must populate const fields matching Python rules.py and codec behavior before md can truly derive 'exact field descriptors from rules.rs'
description: rules.rs defines the struct at line 31 but rules are placeholder empty slices. This violates the intent of the task. Populate with const arrays for each Rule using the FieldDescriptor {field_id, length_bits, mo: Mo::..., cda: Cda::..., target_value, mo_arg}. This is core to making Rust rules the source of truth. P1 for correctness. Discovered in codereview pass 1 for upk9.
close_reason: rules.rs:59-96 now fully populated with FieldDescriptor consts matching Python+codec; cargo check/clippy/tests pass; 3 clean passes
